title: Conditional change of item
excerpt: Hi, I have a board where I have a People column and I was wondering if it is possible to build some logics into the Status column. The logic I would build should be. You can only change the Status column if a person has …

posts.author: kristeb (Bo Kristensen )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I have a board where I have a People column and I was wondering if it is possible to build some logics into the Status column. The logic I would build should be. You can only change the Status column if a person has been assigned in the People column.

The reason: I would like to prevent users of the board to change the Status unless they also assign a person in the Person column.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kristeb !

There is a permission that you can use in the board setting menu! If you go to the ellipse at the top right of your board:

Board Menu2052×1458 231 KB

Then Click on the Board Permissions

Board Settings534×724 43.5 KB

You should be able to see this setting here:

Board Permissions_Assigned to2476×1456 355 KB

This limits users to only change status of items that they are assigned to.

Hope this helps!
